title: Experimental comparison pattern
content: Pattern: establish matched conditions, report the observed metric difference, then contrast complexity without implying generalization beyond the evaluated scope.

title: Limitation pattern
content: Pattern: explicitly bound the observation to the synthetic fixture, identify the single-seed limitation, and state which real-data validation remains necessary.

title: Hypothesis pattern
content: Pattern: frame greater representational capacity as a testable expectation and separately acknowledge its parameter and runtime cost.
